#  Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3 Processors 
## Unlock more everything
[Read the product brief](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/content-details/871378/content-details.html)
![The new Intel Core Ultra Series 3 Badge](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-core-ultra-series-3?qlt=80&wid=375&ts=1771430806411&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3 
[ Experiences ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/core-ultra.html#experiences)
[ Product Specifications ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/core-ultra.html#specifications)
[ Resources ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/core-ultra.html#resources)

[ Read the product brief ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/content-details/871378/content-details.html)
  1. Gaming
  2. Creating
  3. Working
  4. Business
  5. Edge Computing


###  Lightweight laptop, incredible graphics 
More GPU performance from Intel® Arc™ graphics and AI-enhanced gameplay with Intel® XeSS 3 give you ultra-smooth FPS on the go.1
![Person gaming on a laptop.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/male-on-laptop-at-home-gaming:800-960?ts=1764626597772&dpr=on,1)
###  Get the win, then show it off 
Play, stream, and edit, all at once. Intel Xe Media Engine delivers sharp, high-def video without compromising game graphics.
![Screen capture from Battlefield 6 game of a person holding a weapon.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/gla-rev-screenshot-07-sp-3840x2160-nologo:800-960?ts=1765997261645&dpr=on,1)
###  More games, more platforms 
Load up thousands of AAA games and indie titles for a full gaming experience across Steam, Epic, Battle.net, and Xbox Game Pass.
![Person gaming on a laptop in a living room setting.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/female-gaming-laptop:800-960?ts=1765998614825&dpr=on,1)
  1. Gaming 
  2. Gaming 
  3. Gaming 


Previous Next
###  Studio-grade and slim 
Tackle 3D models, long photo and video editing sessions, and heavy exports with Intel® Arc™ graphics, even unplugged and on-the-go.1
![A person smiling while using a laptop in a home setting.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/man-on-laptop-at-home-creating:800-960?ts=1764626529542&dpr=on,1)
###  The most AI experiences on a PC 
Put hours back on the clock. Edit photo libraries and render at lightning speed, using AI apps from over 350 software partners.2
![A screenshot of an image editing program. The image in the program is of a person wearing sunglasses.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/creating-photo-editing-software:800-960?ts=1764714848137&dpr=on,1)
###  Pick up right where you left off 
Find your flow state. It’s even easier to create, edit and render with the programs you love, on a platform you already know.
![A person using a laptop in a home setting.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/women-at-home-on-laptop-creating:800-960?ts=1764626628023&dpr=on,1)
  1. Creating 
  2. Creating 
  3. Creating 


Previous Next
###  A redefined PC experience 
Best-in-class wireless for AI PCs. Crystal-clear Bluetooth™ 6 lets you walk away further than ever. Trusted to run like no other. 3
![Two people collaborating while working on a laptop.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/two-people-on-laptop-working-together:800-960?ts=1764645143588&dpr=on,1)
###  Designed to go unplugged 
Dedicated low-power AI engines and intelligent power management drive smart performance, even when you leave the charger behind.
![A close up of the circuits on a system on a chip.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/green-yellow-chip:800-960?ts=1764645061759&dpr=on,1)
###  Say it and Copilot+ does it 
Delivers the best experience on a Copilot+ PC. Use voice commands to get answers, edit content, and turn ideas into reality.4
![A person talking during a virtual meeting using a laptop.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/man-on-laptop-using-voice-control:800-960?ts=1765998611242&dpr=on,1)
  1. Working 
  2. Working 
  3. Working 


Previous Next
###  Made for growing businesses 
With performance tuned for the apps you use, long-lasting battery, and hardware-level security, these PCs go big for small business.
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/ai-pc/business.html)
![A person using a laptop in an office setting.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/man-on-laptop-in-office-setting:800-960?ts=1764626596297&dpr=on,1)
###  Freshman year to PhD 
With integrated AI acceleration and the best experience on a Copilot+ PC, this is the next advance in higher education.4
![A student using a laptop in a college setting.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/business-college-kid:800-960?ts=1765999362276&dpr=on,1)
###  Engineered for enterprise 
Systems with Intel vPro® are engineered to excel at what matters most to IT. New AI-based insights and manageability tools coming soon. 56
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/architecture-and-technology/vpro/overview.html)
![A person standing in a data center, looking at servers and holding a laptop.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/it-manager:800-960?ts=1764976510783&dpr=on,1)
  1. Business 
  2. Business 
  3. Business 


Previous Next
###  More intelligence out in the field 
Our integrated NPU and GPU power always-on edge AI that runs parallel to work you’re already doing. Discrete accelerators not required.
![Visualization of the interaction of self-driving autonomous vehicles. Robotic cars are controlled by AI, driving along a busy city avenue, scanning the road with sensors, exchanging information.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/stock-smart-city:800-960?ts=1764887925664&dpr=on,1)
###  Tough, smart, reliable 
Support for extended temp and Functional Safety helps these industrial-grade processors deliver, whether it’s -40°C or 100°C.7
![A humanoid robot carrying a box.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/stock-humanoid-robot:800-960?ts=1764887799993&dpr=on,1)
###  One size does not fit all 
Faster defect detection, quicker diagnoses, smarter retail, and lower costs. The latest in edge AI processing fits unique industry needs.
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/core-ultra/edge.html)
![A kiosk in a retail store used by customers to make orders.](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/edge-grocery-robot:800-960?ts=1764887887752&dpr=on,1)

##  Frequently asked questions 
###  Are Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3 processors a good choice for multiple uses like gaming, working and streaming video?
Intel Core Ultra processors are built to perform across everything you do, from work to gaming and everything in between. With 50% more graphics cores on select SKUs, you get the speed to game, stream and edit media with crisp visuals, or work with robust productivity applications, all without sacrificing performance.
###  What types of systems and devices feature Intel Core Ultra Series 3 processors?
Intel Core Ultra processors are featured in a wide variety of devices and form-factors, from ultra-slim laptops, powerful 2-in1s that switch between tablet and clamshell, or creator-focused machines with studio-level features. Choose the style that works best for your life without sacrificing performance or battery life whether you’re at home or on the go.
###  How efficient is battery life for systems featuring Intel Core Ultra Series 3 processors?
Intel Core Ultra processors are designed to be powerful when connected to power or when it matters most: on the move, unplugged and in real life. Intel Evo systems are verified to deliver even longer endurance under real-world conditions using the most widely used games and applications. 8
###  What AI PC capabilities are included in Intel Core Ultra Series 3 processors? 
Intel Core Ultra processors include a number of AI capabilities aimed at improving everyday experiences and promoting battery efficiency. AI capabilities sharpen video calls, improve lighting and block out noise, while speeding up everyday tasks. For gamers and creators, the built-in Intel Arc graphics offer up to 50% more graphics cores on select SKUs, meaning faster, smoother gaming plus AI-accelerated tools.
###  What kinds of Edge computing applications are best suited for Intel Core Ultra Series 3 processors?
Intel Core Ultra processors for edge are suited for a wide variety of innovative AI use cases, including generative AI (GenAI) and agentic AI, while addressing the unique challenges of the industrial edge. From detecting objects to generating insights and taking autonomous action, the processor brings together classic computer vision, generative AI, and agentic intelligence in a single, power-efficient solution for edge deployments. Additionally, this is the first Intel Core Ultra processor with support for industrial-grade extended temperature.7
## **Footnotes and Disclaimers**
Some images on this page are AI generated.
1 Intel® Arc™ graphics only available on select Intel® Core™ Ultra processor powered systems; minimum processor power required. OEM enablement required. Check with OEM or retailer for system configuration.
  
2 Based on analysis of available information as of Oct. 2025, including extensive software options and robust AI features optimized for Intel hardware. AI features may require additional purchase, subscription or enablement, or may have specific configuration or compatibility requirements. Details at [www.intel.com/PerformanceIndex](http://www.intel.com/PerformanceIndex).
  
3 Refers to Intel® Wi-Fi 7 (5 Gig) solutions based on comprehensive feature support for the latest unlicensed wireless standards; PC-first wireless solution development with platform integration, validation, and new feature innovations; and support for the highest levels of wireless security, as of Sept. 2025. Details at [www.intel.com/performance-wireless](http://www.intel.com/performance-wireless). Results may vary.
  
4 As of Oct. 2025, based on extensive software options and robust AI features optimized for Intel hardware, strong AI performance, unique processor architecture, and platform advantages of Intel Core Ultra processor-powered Copilot+ PCs. May require additional purchase or specific configurations. Details at [www.intel.com/PerformanceIndex](http://www.intel.com/PerformanceIndex). Results may vary.
  
5 All versions of Intel vPro® require an eligible Intel processor, a supported operating system, required connectivity technology, firmware enhancements, and other hardware and software. Remote management requires a network connection; must be a known network for Wi-Fi out-of-band management. Details at [intel.com/performance-vpro](https://edc.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/performance/benchmarks/intel-vpro/).
  
6 Remote management requires a network connection; must be a known network for Wi-Fi out-of-band management. See [intel.com/performance-vpro](https://edc.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/performance/benchmarks/intel-vpro/) for details. Results may vary.
  
7 Embedded and industrial use conditions (-40°C to +100°C) designed for 100 percent operation, available on select SKUs.
  
8 Based on verified real-world battery life of Intel Evo designs while performing typical workflows in a realistic environment within average daily usage scenarios. Individual system results may vary. See [intel.com/Performance-Evo](https://edc.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/performance/benchmarks/intel-evo/) for details.

    Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3 Processors

    Unlock more everything

    Read the product brief

    Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3

    Experiences
    Product Specifications
    Resources
    FAQs
    Read the product brief
    1. Gaming
    2. Creating
    3. Working
    4. Business
    5. Edge Computing

    Lightweight laptop, incredible graphics

    More GPU performance from Intel® Arc™ graphics and AI-enhanced gameplay with Intel® XeSS 3 give you ultra-smooth FPS on the go.1

    Get the win, then show it off 

    Play, stream, and edit, all at once. Intel Xe Media Engine delivers sharp, high-def video without compromising game graphics.

    More games, more platforms

    Load up thousands of AAA games and indie titles for a full gaming experience across Steam, Epic, Battle.net, and Xbox Game Pass.
    1. Gaming
    2. Gaming
    3. Gaming

    Studio-grade and slim

    Tackle 3D models, long photo and video editing sessions, and heavy exports with Intel® Arc™ graphics, even unplugged and on-the-go.1

    The most AI experiences on a PC

    Put hours back on the clock. Edit photo libraries and render at lightning speed, using AI apps from over 350 software partners.2

    Pick up right where you left off 

    Find your flow state. It’s even easier to create, edit and render with the programs you love, on a platform you already know.
    1. Creating
    2. Creating
    3. Creating

    A redefined PC experience

    Best-in-class wireless for AI PCs. Crystal-clear Bluetooth™ 6 lets you walk away further than ever. Trusted to run like no other. 3

    Designed to go unplugged

    Dedicated low-power AI engines and intelligent power management drive smart performance, even when you leave the charger behind.

    Say it and Copilot+ does it

    Delivers the best experience on a Copilot+ PC. Use voice commands to get answers, edit content, and turn ideas into reality.4
    1. Working
    2. Working
    3. Working

    Made for growing businesses

    With performance tuned for the apps you use, long-lasting battery, and hardware-level security, these PCs go big for small business.
    Learn more

    Freshman year to PhD

    With integrated AI acceleration and the best experience on a Copilot+ PC, this is the next advance in higher education.4

    Engineered for enterprise 

    Systems with Intel vPro® are engineered to excel at what matters most to IT. New AI-based insights and manageability tools coming soon. 56
    Learn more
    1. Business
    2. Business
    3. Business

    More intelligence out in the field

    Our integrated NPU and GPU power always-on edge AI that runs parallel to work you’re already doing. Discrete accelerators not required.

    Tough, smart, reliable

    Support for extended temp and Functional Safety helps these industrial-grade processors deliver, whether it’s -40°C or 100°C.7

    One size does not fit all

    Faster defect detection, quicker diagnoses, smarter retail, and lower costs. The latest in edge AI processing fits unique industry needs.
    Learn more
    1. Edge Computing
    2. Edge Computing
    3. Edge Computing

    Dive into Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3

    See how it supports smarter power, longer battery life, more robust graphics, and integrated AI, across everything you do.

    Product brief Product specs

    The PC for everything you do

    Find the PC that fits all of you

    Find your PC

    What an AI PC does for you

    See how AI works behind the scenes

    More about AI PCs

    A look into Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3

    Take a walkthrough with PC Gamer

    Read PC Gamer news

    Explore the Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 2

    Find the right processor for you.

    See the series

    Intel® Core™ Ultra partners

    See all Intel partners

    Frequently asked questions

    Intel Core Ultra processors are built to perform across everything you do, from work to gaming and everything in between. With 50% more graphics cores on select SKUs, you get the speed to game, stream and edit media with crisp visuals, or work with robust productivity applications, all without sacrificing performance.

    Intel Core Ultra processors are featured in a wide variety of devices and form-factors, from ultra-slim laptops, powerful 2-in1s that switch between tablet and clamshell, or creator-focused machines with studio-level features. Choose the style that works best for your life without sacrificing performance or battery life whether you’re at home or on the go.

    Intel Core Ultra processors are designed to be powerful when connected to power or when it matters most: on the move, unplugged and in real life. Intel Evo systems are verified to deliver even longer endurance under real-world conditions using the most widely used games and applications. 8

    Intel Core Ultra processors include a number of AI capabilities aimed at improving everyday experiences and promoting battery efficiency. AI capabilities sharpen video calls, improve lighting and block out noise, while speeding up everyday tasks. For gamers and creators, the built-in Intel Arc graphics offer up to 50% more graphics cores on select SKUs, meaning faster, smoother gaming plus AI-accelerated tools.

    Intel Core Ultra processors for edge are suited for a wide variety of innovative AI use cases, including generative AI (GenAI) and agentic AI, while addressing the unique challenges of the industrial edge. From detecting objects to generating insights and taking autonomous action, the processor brings together classic computer vision, generative AI, and agentic intelligence in a single, power-efficient solution for edge deployments. Additionally, this is the first Intel Core Ultra processor with support for industrial-grade extended temperature.7

    Footnotes and Disclaimers

    Some images on this page are AI generated.

     

    1  Intel® Arc™ graphics only available on select Intel® Core™ Ultra processor powered systems; minimum processor power required. OEM enablement required. Check with OEM or retailer for system configuration.


    2 Based on analysis of available information as of Oct. 2025, including extensive software options and robust AI features optimized for Intel hardware. AI features may require additional purchase, subscription or enablement, or may have specific configuration or compatibility requirements. Details at www.intel.com/PerformanceIndex.


    3 Refers to Intel® Wi-Fi 7 (5 Gig) solutions based on comprehensive feature support for the latest unlicensed wireless standards; PC-first wireless solution development with platform integration, validation, and new feature innovations; and support for the highest levels of wireless security, as of Sept. 2025. Details at www.intel.com/performance-wireless. Results may vary.


    4 As of Oct. 2025, based on extensive software options and robust AI features optimized for Intel hardware, strong AI performance, unique processor architecture, and platform advantages of Intel Core Ultra processor-powered Copilot+ PCs. May require additional purchase or specific configurations. Details at www.intel.com/PerformanceIndex. Results may vary.


    5 All versions of Intel vPro® require an eligible Intel processor, a supported operating system, required connectivity technology, firmware enhancements, and other hardware and software. Remote management requires a network connection; must be a known network for Wi-Fi out-of-band management. Details at intel.com/performance-vpro.


    6 Remote management requires a network connection; must be a known network for Wi-Fi out-of-band management. See intel.com/performance-vpro for details. Results may vary.


    7 Embedded and industrial use conditions (-40°C to +100°C) designed for 100 percent operation, available on select SKUs.


    8 Based on verified real-world battery life of Intel Evo designs while performing typical workflows in a realistic environment within average daily usage scenarios. Individual system results may vary. See intel.com/Performance-Evo for details.
